all.en: My name is Wei-Ting, and I am a senior high school student in Taipei.
all.zh: 我叫偉廷，是台北的一名高中生。

all.en: Next month, I am going to take the GEPT intermediate level test for the first time.
all.zh: 下個月，我將第一次參加全民英檢中級測驗。

all.en: My parents have encouraged me to prepare seriously because the certificate may help me in the future.
all.zh: 爸媽鼓勵我認真準備，因為這張證書未來可能對我有幫助。

all.en: Every day after school, I spend at least one hour reviewing vocabulary and grammar.
all.zh: 每天放學後，我至少花一小時複習單字和文法。

all.en: I also listen to English podcasts on the bus to improve my listening skills.
all.zh: 我也會在公車上聽英文 podcast 來加強聽力。

all.en: My English teacher recommended a useful website that provides free practice tests.
all.zh: 我的英文老師推薦了一個提供免費模擬測驗的實用網站。

all.en: Last weekend, I joined a small study group with three of my classmates.
all.zh: 上週末我加入了一個由三位同學組成的小型讀書會。

all.en: We practiced speaking by asking and answering questions about daily life.
all.zh: 我們透過詢問和回答日常生活的問題來練習口說。

all.en: If I pass the intermediate level, I will try the high-intermediate level next year.
all.zh: 如果我通過中級，明年我就會挑戰中高級。

all.en: I know learning English is not easy, but I really enjoy making progress step by step.
all.zh: 我知道學英文不容易，但我真的很享受一步步進步的過程。

all.en: Sometimes I feel nervous, so my mother reminds me to relax and get enough sleep.
all.zh: 有時候我會感到緊張，所以媽媽會提醒我放輕鬆、要睡飽。

all.en: I believe that with hard work and a positive attitude, I will reach my goal.
all.zh: 我相信只要努力並保持積極的態度，我一定能達成目標。

all.en: Two weeks before the exam, I started taking a full practice test every Saturday morning.
all.zh: 考試前兩週，我開始每週六早上做一次完整的模擬測驗。

all.en: My listening scores improved a lot, but the reading section still made me nervous.
all.zh: 我的聽力分數進步很多，但閱讀部分還是讓我緊張。

all.en: My English teacher kindly offered to check my writing samples after school every Wednesday.
all.zh: 英文老師很好心地願意每週三放學後幫我批改作文。

all.en: She pointed out that my sentences were correct but lacked variety in structure.
all.zh: 她指出我的句子雖然正確，但句型缺乏變化。

all.en: I tried to use new conjunctions and transitions in every essay I wrote.
all.zh: 我試著在每篇文章中使用新的連接詞和轉折詞。

all.en: The night before the exam, my mother made my favorite dumplings to help me relax.
all.zh: 考前一晚，媽媽煮了我最愛的水餃讓我放鬆心情。

all.en: I packed my pencil case, ID card, and admission ticket carefully into my bag.
all.zh: 我把鉛筆盒、身分證和准考證仔細地放進包包裡。

all.en: On the morning of the test, my father drove me to the testing center an hour early.
all.zh: 考試當天早上，爸爸提早一小時開車送我到考場。

all.en: When the exam finally began, I took a deep breath and reminded myself to stay calm.
all.zh: 考試正式開始時，我深吸一口氣，提醒自己保持冷靜。

all.en: Three weeks later, the results arrived, and I had passed the intermediate level with a high score.
all.zh: 三週後成績出爐了，我以高分通過了中級檢定。
